seoDescription: ACPS 2026-2027 traditional calendar for parents and students, with Aug 24 first day, Jun 17 last day, holidays, breaks, early dismissals, official PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: ACPS starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on August 24, 2026 and ends on June 17, 2027. Preschool at the ACPS Early Childhood Center and VPI classes starts on August 26. Thanksgiving/Fall Break runs November 25-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 22-26. The calendar was approved December 18, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Alexandria City Public Schools start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Alexandria City Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is ACPS Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the ACPS 2026-2027 traditional calendar runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for ACPS in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for Alexandria City Public Schools students is Thursday, June 17, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does ACPS Winter Break end in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: ACPS Winter Break ends Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return after Winter Break on Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: What are ACPS no-school days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: ACPS no-school days include district holidays, conference days, teacher work days, professional learning days, and major recess periods such as Thanksgiving/Fall Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break. This page separates those dates from early dismissals and cultural observances.

calendarFaqs.q: Does ACPS have teacher work days when students do not attend?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. ACPS lists teacher work days and professional learning days on the traditional calendar. Students do not attend on those dates, so families should add them separately from holidays and major breaks.

calendarFaqs.q: Does ACPS have school on Election Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No. The ACPS 2026-2027 traditional calendar lists Tuesday, November 3, 2026 as Election Day / Professional Learning Day, which is a no-school day for students.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I download the ACPS calendar for Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides an unofficial one-time ACPS .ics calendar file generated from the reviewed 2026-2027 calendar records. Families can import it into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook and should still verify updates with ACPS.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: K-12 students start on August 24, 2026; preschool and VPI classes start on August 26.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: ACPS schedules spring break one week earlier than the prior school year.

yearNumbers.label: Standalone No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Beyond Thanksgiving/Fall Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break, ACPS lists 16 standalone weekdays without regular student classes, including holidays, conferences, teacher work days, and professional learning days.

yearNumbers.label: June Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists high school final exam early dismissals June 14-17 and all-student afternoon teacher-workday early dismissals June 16-17.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 18 in 2025 to August 24 in 2026.
Spring Break moves from March 30-April 3 in 2026 to March 22-26 in 2027.
The last day moves from June 12 in 2026 to June 17 in 2027.
